bugs.error_message: function round(double precision, integer) does not exist

bugs.error_message: Wrong reference: Org should be unknown
functions in index predicate must be marked IMMUTABLE (SQLSTATE 42P17)
bugs.root_cause: Partial-unique index on plan_adjustments used now() in the WHERE predicate (expires_at > now()). PG requires IMMUTABLE functions in index predicates; now() is STABLE.
bugs.fix: Narrow the predicate to revoked_at IS NULL only. Keep expiry filtering in the RPC bodies where it belongs. Expired-but-not-revoked rows still block insert at the unique index, but the upsert RPC revokes-before-insert so the invariant holds.

bugs.error_message: Filter bar does not work — RPC rejects empty string status
bugs.root_cause: Filter form's "any" option has value="". Selecting it and submitting produces ?status= in the URL, which searchParams parses as empty string, not undefined. Using `params.status ?? null` coalesces only nullish values, so the empty string was forwarded to admin.accounts_list which rejects unknown statuses. ?? is correct for nullish-coalescing semantics — the actual fix is to treat empty strings as equivalent to missing filters before the RPC call.
bugs.fix: Added a `nullable(s)` helper that returns `s && s.length > 0 ? s : null`, then use nullable(params.status) / nullable(params.plan) / nullable(params.q) when calling accounts_list. Same pattern likely needed on /accounts/page.tsx if testing reveals it; not touched here (scope).

bugs.error_message: invalid input syntax for type uuid: "operation"
bugs.root_cause: User typed /billing/operation (singular) expecting the operations sub-route /billing/operations (plural). Next.js correctly routed the typo to the [accountId] dynamic segment with accountId='operation', and the page passed it unchecked to admin.account_detail → Postgres uuid cast rejected with a bare error.
bugs.fix: Added a UUID regex check at the top of the detail page; non-UUID path segments now call notFound() instead of hitting the RPC. Same guard probably worth adding on /accounts/[accountId], /orgs/[orgId], etc. — not done here (scope).

bugs.error_message: admin-lifecycle-rpcs.test.ts — 'last active platform_operator' guards fail / 60s timeout in shared dev DB
bugs.root_cause: 5+ active platform_operator rows accumulated in shared dev DB from prior test runs. Test suspend-loop handles non-opA POs but the RPC count query inside admin_change_role / admin_disable either sees stale data or deadlocks. Unrelated to ADR-1001 Sprint 2.1 (api_keys does not touch admin schema).
bugs.fix: Not fixed in this session — out of scope for ADR-1001 Sprint 2.1. Proposed cleanup: the test should suspend ALL admin_role rows whose tier ≥ platform_operator (captures orphans) and restore in finally, or a dedicated clean-DB step should precede the admin-lifecycle suite.

bugs.error_message: gst-statement.test.ts — 'owner + NULL issuer returns all three invoices across both issuers' expected 4 to be 3
bugs.root_cause: Shared dev DB has orphan invoice rows from prior runs. Test filters owner-scope + NULL issuer and expects exactly the three invoices it created; found 4. Same shape as billing_test_isolation memory entry.
bugs.fix: Not fixed in this session — test file is uncommitted from earlier ADR-0050 Sprint 3.1 work, not part of ADR-1001 Sprint 2.1 ship. Proposed: change exact-count assertions to .toContain(id) per created invoice, or filter the RPC result by account_id before counting.
